# HTML/CSS/JS Specialist Skill

Purpose: Provide code-style guidance, scaffolding examples, and HTML/CSS/JS best practices for the game page.

Capabilities:
- Recommend semantic HTML structure and accessible `<canvas>` usage.
- Provide CSS variable based theming and scoped styles guidance.
- Suggest JS module boundaries, deterministic game-loop timing, and testable function interfaces.

Inputs: UX spec, sprite metadata.
Outputs: style checklist, sample scaffolding snippets (as prompts/examples), and code review rules.
